gazette: Official Gazette dated March 01, 2024, and numbered 32476
title: Amendments to the Regulation on the Import Inspection of Maternity and Baby Products
bodyHtml:
Changes have been made to the annexes of the Regulation on the Import Inspection of Maternity and Baby Products (Product Safety and Inspection: 2024/17).

In inspections conducted under the Turkish Food Codex (KODEKS) by the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry, the Turkish Food Codex Regulation on Plastics and Materials in Contact with Food (Regulation No: 2019/44) Annex 2 will also be applied.

Additionally, compliance with the following standards will be required in inspections under the 2024/17 regulation:

  • TS EN 13209-2 (Child use and care articles - Child carrying devices - Safety requirements and test methods)
  • TS EN 14372. Child Use and Care Articles - Cutlery and Feeding Utensils for Children - Safety Rules and Tests

In inspections of teething devices, cadmium will also be checked.

For products defined as "products for the use of babies and children, nipple protectors, breast shields for breastfeeding, milk storage bags, and containers" made of plastic in tariff position 3924, inspections will be carried out for "lead, cadmium, PAH, phthalates, DOP" under the REACH Regulation.

The "DOT" check has been removed from inspections of products in tariff position 9619, which includes "tampons, sanitary pads, breast pads, and diapers."

For products in tariff position 8414, specifically "milk pumps, pumps and components for sets," the "DOT" has been removed, and "DOP" has been added within the scope of the REACH checks.

Furthermore, the expression "3. Test report and photos of the product to be imported ()" in Annex-3 of the Regulation has been changed to "3. Test report from an accredited laboratory and photos of the product to be imported ()," and the expression "** Declaration of Conformity to the Toy Safety Regulation" has been changed to "** Declaration of Conformity to the Toy Safety Regulation and the Regulation on Electrical Equipment Designed for Certain Voltage Limits (2014/35/EU) (LVD) for products within its scope."

These changes, effective from January 1, 2024, have come into force as of March 1.

For the Amendment to the Regulation on the Import Inspection of Maternity and Baby Products (Product Safety and Inspection: 2024/17), click here.
